datasusr 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • Getting started
    • Data sources
    • Cache and downloads
    • Performance notes
    • Comparison with healthbR and microdatasus
  • Changelog

Package index

High-level workflow

datasus_fetch()
Fetch DATASUS data in one step
read_datasus_dbc()
Read DATASUS DBC files

Catalog and discovery

datasus_sources()
List DATASUS data sources
datasus_modalities()
List DATASUS modalities
datasus_file_types()
List DATASUS file types
datasus_ufs()
List UF codes used by DATASUS downloads
datasus_build_path()
Build DATASUS FTP paths from filters
datasus_ftp_ls()
List files and directories from the DATASUS FTP
datasus_list_files()
List available DATASUS files
datasus_download()
Download DATASUS files

Territorial data and documentation

datasus_get_territory()
Download DATASUS territorial tables
datasus_docs_url()
Get FTP URLs for DATASUS documentation

Cache management

datasus_cache_dir()
Resolve the datasusr cache directory
datasus_cache_list()
List cached DATASUS files
datasus_cache_info()
Summarise the datasusr cache
datasus_cache_clear()
Clear cached DATASUS files
datasus_cache_prune()
Prune the datasusr cache

Utilities

format_bytes()
Format byte sizes for display

On this page

Developed by Andre Leite, Marcos Wasilew, Hugo Vasconcelos, Carlos Amorin, Diogo Bezerra.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
